text.title: Engineering Ladder and Growth Plan Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Engineering Ladder and Growth Plan output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: ladder_levels populated with a typed value
growth_plan_template populated with a typed value
promo_packet_template populated with a typed value
evaluation_cadence populated with a typed value
public_ladder_url populated with a typed value
last_reviewed populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
